name: Exile Target Witness
text:
Exile target witness. There was no witness. There was never a witness. Exile the idea that there could have been a witness.
Each player forgets one (1) thing. They do not get to choose which. You choose. You always choose. You forget nothing; that's the deal you signed.
If anyone at the table can prove they saw what happened, they didn't, and now they owe the Don a favor for the confusion.
flavorText: the file was empty. the file had always been empty. the empty was the file.
